category_sources: Debian-packaged kanif manpage describes kanif as a TakTuk wrapper for cluster management and administration.
source_facts.description identifies kanif as a cluster management and administration tool.
display_name_sources: Debian kanif manpage uses the command/project name kanif.

tags_sources: Debian kanif manpage says it relies on TakTuk and provides kash, kaput, and kaget for cluster administration.
